params.name: Head of Sargon
params.description:
On Feb 4, 2307 BC, the Head of Sargon was made in ancient Akkad.
Head of Sargon was cast in honor of Sargon, the king of Akkad. The whole head, majestic and solemn, shows the king's fortitude, strength and confidence. The statue's eyes were originally embedded with gems which got lost later. The face carving is simple and realistic, the hair decoration is unique and powerful, and the casting is very delicate, which fully shows the superb copper casting technology in ancient times.
